headlines.description: Returning Declan Rice set England on course for a morale-boosting 3-0 victory against Costa Rica after a heavy thunderstorm in Orlando delayed their final World Cup warmup match by an hour.
headlines.shortLinkText: England sign off WC prep with 3-0 Costa Rica win
